review_text:
Stayed on a Powered site with our own cvan.
Fantastic location.
Little older park but toilet/shower blocks are well maintained and clean.
Washing/drying facilities, a heated pool and lovely relaxed atmosphere (most of the time!).
Glam tents are awesome to stay in as well and cabins and newer units.
We love staying here.

I stayed for a weekend in their deluxe safari tent. It was absolutely glamping in every sense. I highly recommend it for singles, couples or smaller family groups (double and a bunk bed). My friends stayed in the 2 bedroom cabins with their kids and we had a fantastic weekend. Located right on the beach, we watched others fish at sunset while the kids played in the sand and waves. The coffee car that sets up near the beach entry in the morning was very convenient. Staff were very friendly and helpful.
Excellent place to visit with family n friends
Nice shady sites. Beach access and clean and tidy amenities. What more could you need.
Definitely would recommend this park it was close to the beach and sea the people are very friendly and staff as well it's got an indoor pool around 30 degrees,good if you have small children 😀,

Reasonable caravan park. Good location. Good facilities. Disappointed that the sites were so jam-packed together and also not grassed as was shown in the advertised photos. We chose this CP over an unpowered site at another location because we thought we would be getting a nice grassed site.

Often stay here when in the area. Their cabins are very nice and kept clean.
And bonus of the location is that it’s only a short walk through the park and onto the beach.

These guys were fantastic,  we had an Issue with our van that meant we had to stay and the leave early then return.. they gave us a great site to stay hooked up, let me use the workshop to fix what I could, helped printing paper work, and every staff member has been welcoming and happy.. the location is awesome.. the beach is stunning.. absolutely recommend 👌

We recently had the pleasure of staying in one of the new safari (glamping) tents at the discovery park Busselton. The accommodation exceeded our expectations, the highlight being the rain shower. We rate the shower one of the best we have encountered throughout our journey in WA. The tent also came with a generous outdoor area and only metres from the beach access path.|Highly recommend.
Walking distance to beach. Friendly and excellent service from staff. Boiling kettle is old and dirty needs to replace.

Requested a cancellation over 2 months before our planned stay. Told we'll be charged a minimum of 1 night (250$), considering we only booked the day before we are still in shock! How about give us our money back!
BUYER BEWARE!!!
Rooms and camp kitchens great near the beach

Very nice and clean carven park we Have had a great stay.
Very nice coffee and bakery.
Bad nabours

DO NOT BOOK HERE FOR LEAVERS!! My son who is 18 years old recently returned from leavers and we were disgusted with this place. Wasted $1600 for him to just store his bag here as he ended up staying at a friends accommodation instead. I was told the unit was tiny and old as parents weren’t allowed to go past the front gate to inspect the units or help their kids into the accommodation. Sounds like they were trying to hide the state of these units!! No visitors were allowed so my son couldn’t catch up with friends here. He also brought alcohol which he is legally allowed to drink but they ransacked everyone’s car and rooms and confiscated all alcohol. We were told it was stated in the fine print of the booking conditions that alcohol was not permitted but it was never stated in the original documents when the booking was made. If we had known this we never would have booked. I asked to take the alcohol back with me and was refused. They kept everyone’s alcohol which is profiteering and stealing!!
Would definitely not recommend this place. Other accommodation allowed drinking inside the units and just kept an eye on rudely behaviour. Don’t waste your money!!

We stayed in cabin 22 from 13th to 16 November. We were very disappointed the kitchen cupboards stunk of mice we had mice poo on the bed the bathroom stunk of sewerage the bathroom was so tiny there were 2 2 seater lounges which didn't fit in the space My husband tried to get moved to another cabin but unfortunately they were fully booked
Amazing location and the park was very neat and tidy

Had 5 nights here on a powered site. It's in a lovely location very close to the beach and about 8kms out of Busselton. There is a great walking and bike track all the way into Busselton which l used on several occasions.
First night great, second and third night was hell due to a large group of people who thought the whole park was purely for them. It was Halloween, their kids dressed up and were then wandering around the park from group to group until well after 10pm, with the parents up even later.  The same happened the following night, even though a text message had been sent through that day, reminding people that quiet time was from 10pm. At 10.40pm, l had to get out of bed, open my door and ask them to quieten down. They then moved further up the road and continued on as if it was 11am instead of 11pm!! This in turn affected other people.
The selfish behaviour of this large group of people, ruined 2 full days of my stay and the same for others too....
Once they left, it was bliss....

Stayed for 4 nights as used as a base to explore Margaret River and Pemberton as well as Bussleton.

Staff were extremely helpful. Very positive. Easy access to the beach and the bike path which we used plenty of times.

Very quiet and peaceful.

Amenities were clean, though would love to see a path of to the rear amenities  to avoid dirt on wet shoes coming back from shower or when it is wet.

However very tight roads between sites and hard to reverse a van in , definitely need patience. (we only had a 15ft so hate to think was larger vans would have to deal with).

Concrete slab on our site needs redoing as. it is broken and raised.

Came here for a post high school trip with my friends last December, we loved it so much we are planning on making it an annual trip, pool is very warm, good shallow end for kids, but deep end deep enough for plenty of fun for adults. The kitchen was clean, wifi was spotty at best, usable but not something to rely on as it wasn't always working enough to load anything, but great to have when it did, it is usually a bit stronger in the kitchen, which has tables and couches, which seem sanitary for a public couch. Close enough to town to be able to pop in but not in the bustle of everything. If you come in summer, be prepared for lots of Cicadas on the outside of your tent.

This caravan park has 3 amenities blocks all kept to a high standard of cleanliness. A great indoor heated pool, very large sites which is great if you have a large setup or you can hire a cabin.  There is a dump point, power and water as well as beach access at the rear leading to a walking/bike path if you feel energetic.

Family of 4 stayed 3 nights in a Superior Safari Tent. A challenge with canvas tents is mould and this tent was definitely showing it. The canvas was covered in mold and dust, as shown in the pictures. We aired the tent throughout the day to help with the dank smell, but the wet area doesn't have any way to create a good cross flow.||The shower drain was blocked up (reported to reception). This was not addressed or fixed during our stay. Despite running the shower on low, water pooled at our feet bringing up the muck, and overflowed into the room. Pictures also show clumps of hair from previous occupants.||The air conditioner kept us warm at night and very cool during the day. Hopefully its filters were clean, as the mould in the tent had us concerned.||The microwave did not heat up at all! We could not reheat or cook our food.||The indoor heated pool was nice & warm however, it too requires some maintenance as there was a lining of dirt & dead bugs surrounding the pool.||Discovery Park itself was quiet & very close to the beach. It was nice to hear the waves and great central location.||I would not recommend staying in the Safari Tents due to the aged state of the tent and its amenities.

Flew over from Melbourne to meet friends who were traveling around Australia. The cabin I stayed in was SPOTLESS! Was fortunately upgraded to a two bedroom cabin, about 150 metres from the beach. The walking and riding track into Busselton was great. Hired an e scooter a couple of times. The park was top class! THANKYOU. Highly recommended! It was such a great park with lots of space.

Staff were extremely helpful. Very positive. Park is green, grassy and clean. Very tight roads between sites but manageable if your patient.
Straight out on the beach for sunsets.
Small pop top van with 2 swags fit well on the site.
Amenities all clean and easy to get to.
Location is good. Hotel is clean.

We stayed Friday through Sunday and had such a great experience. On Friday morning I called to see if our cabin could be ready an hour earlier, and the staff were absolutely lovely about it — so polite and friendly over the phone. When we arrived hours earlier than expected, we were fully prepared to wait, but they happily checked us in straight away. Honestly, the staff couldn’t have been more welcoming or helpful.

The cabin itself was amazing — cheap and cheerful, with everything we needed. It had a full-size fridge, four single beds in two bunk sets, and a separate bedroom with a double bed and wardrobe. There was pantry space and an outdoor area which wasn’t private, but that didn’t bother us as we weren’t there much. The only challenge was keeping our two very young kids away from the road out front. A couple of small improvements that would make a big difference would be adding a washer/dryer and a basic vacuum cleaner. With the wet weather we brought in quite a bit of dirt and debris, and I imagine it would be the same with sand in summer.

The heated indoor pool was next level — such a huge plus! I really hope Discovery Parks Busselton continues to do well so they can put a bit of money into sprucing up the cabins, but honestly we were stoked with them as they are. We’ll definitely be back in the warmer months! 🌞
We have stayed here a few times now, in summer and in winter it is great. LOVEEE it the kids love it as well. the indoor heated pool in the middle of winter is a hit!!

We stayed here for a short trip with a friend and really enjoyed it. The reception staff was very friendly and even let us enter the park while waiting for our room. The cabin was clean and comfortable, with a kitchen, toiletries provided, and a super comfy bed – we both slept so well! The environment is peaceful, parking is available, and overall the place feels very relaxing. A great stay in Busselton, would definitely come back.

We stayed in a cabin here for 4 nights during July school holidays (with 2 kids). Great to get upgraded to a superior cabin from a standard and the reception staff were really nice to take my fridge items from main kitchen to the cabin fridge when the cabin became available (we arrived mid morning before check in). There is only one very small camp kitchen with a small fridge so recommend bringing your own camp fridge if you're in a tent!

Cabin was generally clean but bunk beds had a brown dust on the sheets I had to clean (maybe the beds were vacant for a while with sheets on and other bedding just put on top without cleaning). Couch was very stained with drink spills and chocolate stains so that was a bit gross and we put a blanket on it - and also the oven didn't work. When I asked reception to check it even if we were not home they had checked it, decided it could not be fixed until a part arrived but failed to tell me this/leave me a note or message me. This is really disappointing as I had dinners planned that needed the oven for. We came back from days put after 5pm each day so I could not follow up with reception myself. I did get a sincere apology at check out for this and at least everyone was nice but I would have preferred some  communication. Campsite so close to the beach, super location.
We stayed in our caravan very nice right near the ocean staff are friendly and helpful look forward to staying again in the near future 😀 👍
Amazing exprience. I would go there again

What wonderful and helpful staff. They couldn’t do enough to help in moving our booking forward due to early settlement. The entrance to the park is a bit difficult to find, set back a bit from the road, and no turning in lane, but easy to access when you get in.
They have a coffee van that comes in every morning which is worth the walk down to the beach end of the park.
Nice parks, bbq areas and walkways to beach.
Nice place to stay. Near everything you need in Busselton

Nice park, good location.
You need to play dodgem trees to park your caravan. Very tight roads

15 days here and has been the perfect park to catch up with family. Accommodating staff. Clean fresh amenities, great showers (hot). Quiet and cosy. Great communication from staff if there is the smallest issue occuring. A little tight for the inexperienced caravaners but well worth the effort. Beautiful beach at your doorstep, heated pool and lovely playground for the grandkids. Would highly recommend.

Really enjoyed my stay here.  I was on a powered site so I can't speak for the cabins.  Easy access to amenities,  camp kitchen left clean by everyone.  Opportunities to bbq in 2 different locations, if you don't have your own.  Campers seemed to leave everything clean after use.  Park is well managed,  staff are friendly and helpful.  Will definitely stay there again when I'm in the area
It's a nice place with a mix of chalets and parking for campavans. Super near the beach, a few minutes from the chalet. You can catch sunrise and sunset from the beach here.
Righ at the beach, good facilities and friendly staff.

It is a lovely park to stay,( we had a 2 bedroom chalet).  However I have to say it appears like you  jam as many caravans and chalets in as possible.  To get our car in and out was a nightmare. Next to us were chalets across from us tents. Nowhere to turn so had to back out on a very narrow , whindy excuse for a road.   Very stressful.

Solid experience, short walk to Tonic. Beach in your backyard. Great bbq facilities, cleaning needs some slight attention, looks like a drink was thrown under the bed before our stay, overall great experience! Hidden gem.

Very friendly service, booked us in at short notice with an awkward (read: unknown) arrival time and accommodated our desire to pay with a gift card which can be tricky after hours. Generous indoor pool. We extended our stay.

Stayed in the gaming tent . Great spot loved the wild life (possums so cute)
Unfortunately the smell of possum pee is a little strong when tent gets hot.
This aside great place to stay.

Ideal for family stay, well equipped with kitchen appliances,  cooking utensils, and basic seasoning. We had our delicious home cooked breakfast and dinner in the cabin. 100m away to the beach, it's simply awesome!
Site was roomy and lots of shade.  Staff are friendly and helpful.  We look forward to a return visit 👍
Camping sympathique. Un peu cher en haute saison (nous travaillions à côté sans accommodation) tout était propre, le personnel très sympathique, surtout Trevor qui nous a souvent aidé !

Had another great stay here, the cabins are well maintained and clean with plenty of space for everyone. BBQ facilities have been upgraded and were MUCH better to use!

The proximity to the beach is also unmatched! You’re so close to a beautiful beach where you can swim, chill and fish 🎣
Great location right on the beach. Friendly staff in reception. Clean park and lovely sites with lots of shade and trees.

Would I return? For the location, I might,
We were camping there with our camper so cannot review the chalets available.

Pros:
1. Walk to beach from camp site
2. Indoor heated pool which allowed us to escape the sun & heat in the middle of the day but still stay cool.
3. short walk / 1 minute drive to the nearest supermarket.
4. Very shady camp site with beautiful trees.

Cons:
1. Housekeeping was lacklustre. The toilets/showers were not cleaned daily or if it was, noted that the cleaning roster not updated. We were there for 5 days and noticed there were days not cleaned. Because of that, the showers and toilet was constantly not clean. I have been to campsites where the upkeep was heaps better.
2. Opportunistic thieving happens. We lost our bike overnight as we forgot to lock it. Our fault. But at the same time, this has never happened in other campsites we had been to when we did not lock our bikes up. When we approached the staff, their attitude was very lack lustre and unappealing. More could be done to keep campsites safer.
3. Very open access to site. With its ideal location, it meant it is along a busy main road and has direct access to beach so not exactly a site that felt safe from randoms walking through.
The bathrooms had a code to gain access but the keypad for one was damaged anyway so not much of a security.
Beach access from the site had no security gates so the campsite is very open.
4. Camp water/power points felt very dated and was positioned in odd spots. We had to make sure our power line was long enough as it was stretching across the next campsite to get to the power outlet.
5. Camp kitchen was small and only had one sink. Communal area was very limited and small.

The location itself is fantastic. Unfortunately, the cons listed does not make it very attractive for us to return or recommend it

The noise from the air conditioner at the back of the resort next door is unbearable from site 89. It sounds like a constant jet engine, but beyond the control of the park. Otherwise the park is fine, nice pool, great beach access and helpful staff, who kindly moved us.

The place itself is great, but the staff is absolutely infuriating. Every day, from 10 AM to 2 PM, they run lawn trimmers (extremely noisy) and blow away the cut grass and fallen leaves with blowers (the noise is so loud that even adults get ear pain). This happens right when it’s time for children to nap, and it’s impossible to rest. The cleaning staff in the cabins walk around with radios blaring at full volume.

With this kind of background noise, all the other advantages of the park fade to zero!

I do not recommend it for families, the elderly, or anyone looking for peace and quiet.
Nice location but very dated, caravan pitch we had was  very small and difficult to get on to, also opposite some very old residential caravans. Toilet block very clean.

We had a great stay at the Discovery parks. We had a 2 bed chalet, a bit dated, especially the shower area but the chalet itself was nice and clean, enough space for family of 4:) kitchen had all the equipment we needed:) reverse aircon worked well.
Location is the winner:) few steps away tona beach, it felt like a private beach;) kids loved scooting on bike path and we loved taking long walks:)
The park itself is well organised, it was packed, yet it wasn’t loud, the indoor pool was a highlight for the kids:) again, it would get a bit busy at times but nothing crazy;)
Staff at the reception very welcoming:)
Price was great comparing to other places in the neighbourhood, we will definitely be back to the Discovery park:)
Clean ablution block.

Kelly, Lyn and the entire Discovery Parks team at Busselton were a pleasure to deal with. Their customer service is fantastic, they went above and beyond to help us find accommodation on a short time frame. The cabins were very clean and well appointed. The park is in a great spot right on the beach, very well kept facilities, overall one of the best caravan parks we have visited!!
Great location, near to town and right on the beach, manager kelly was lovely

Four star location is the draw card, stayed here 2 years ago and this year winter (2024) .The only reason we didn't stay in 2023 is because we were hoping they would get electric blowers in and replace those 125db portable industrial blowers that are designed for industry or minesites(no signs saying ppe required) where everybody wears ear protection. They start these big blowers Mon /Fri around 9:30 am could go for a couple of hours, can be heard down the beach. All this noise just to blow away a few small leaves???  Next day the same leaves getting blowing away again?? Tough if you want a quiet breakfast or read the paper or even just relax and enjoy the peace and quiet of a "holiday park" ..???

Great locations. Fair price for the cabin we had. Beach a very short walk from the cabin. Nice heated pool.

Things to improve;
The main bed in our cabin had no quilt cover on the quilt. Sheets are too short for the bed. Two sheets laid over each other, which was odd. Also, a sheet is either side of the quilt instead of a cover. Otherwise, I can't fault it. Awesome location. Fair price for the cabin. Had everything you need in it.

Having WiFi available would be great.

Maybe some signage regarding the swimming lessons in the heated pool. The lessons took up half the pool from the paying guests. The swim teacher was annoyed when guests came near her half of the pool.
Nice place to Tent...
Staff were super helpful and accommodating, I believe I dealt with Poppy (?) I realised after hours that I had booked for the wrong day, at short notice.

After all our travels around Australia, Trevor in reception is by far the nicest, friendliness and most helpful. From check in to check out it was a great experience. It is so nice to camp under the peppermint trees. Amenities were clean and all in great working order. We also found this park was much cheaper than many of the others around. Right on the beach and beautiful sites, what more could you want. Thanks Discovery Parks Busso!

We did glamping it was an amazing experience which I have always wanted to experience. As sometimes when camping can be quiet stressful putting tent up ,general set-up etc, this is just walk into tent and relax and enjoy your glamping experience without those worries.
Welcoming service, fantastic communication prior to visiting, beautiful tree shade across the grounds and easy access to the beach

Friendly, helpful staff. The camp grounds are cleaned, mowed, and leaves blown away as soon as campers leave, before the next campers arrive. This park has a beautiful pool and exits onto the beach. A short walk to the shopping centre to get essentials as well as Fish&chips and other delicious eats. Manager Kelly texted us with updates re: maintenance,  coffee van etc. Nothing is too much for her. We've been there a few times with the same top-notch treatment.  Thank you 😊
Kitchen with stoves, fridge and sitting area, Cleaned shared bathrooms, pool and access to the beach. There's a small supermarket nearby. Plenty of shady areas were to camp. Great service!

It's the place to be. All of the staff are amazing, kind and cheerful. 😊
I recommend it with no hesitation.
Thanks
Florent
A repeat stay last year in a camper van, this year in a cabin. Super staff all very friendly and helpful. We were near a lovely beach wonderful and we would recommend it to you!
Amazing place for the kids and so close to the beach. Great communal BBQ area and the service was fantastic. Definitely coming back here.

Lovely campground, beautiful facilities and very friendly reception team. However it turn a bit sour the last day of our stay. We were there with our 3 kids(6-4-2 years old). We were told quite time was from 10pm to 6am. At 6:45am my kids were up and out looking for bugs with kids from another site. Not screaming or anything just hanging around. We were approached by a cranky stuff member and were told that they got a complain and if we didn't keep our children quite we pretty much had to leave and take them somewhere else. Funny enough the people that complain (I saw them going to the reception) were parting, drinking and making lots of noise the night before till well passed midnight, which we didn't complain as we understand it's a campground and everyone should have fun,  little and big. We just didn't find it fair, our kids were not being loud, and this people obviously hangover simply didn't like my kids early energy. Stuff member didn't even check if they were actually being loud. I still give this park good stars because its a lovely place with nice atmosphere. Maybe just some staff members should work on people's skills.

Fabulous location, with direct beach access. Well-maintained grounds, playground and swimming pool (which was beautifully heated). We stayed on a powered site, standard size and spacing for this area. Wonderful, friendly service at the front desk.
Only room for improvement would be a family access bathroom or shower room, for families with young children.
During school holidays, there was a regular morning coffee van (with great coffee!), and some other food vans.
Would definitely stay again.
a very nice caravan park right on the beach, 6 kms out of Busselton spacious sites good facilities,  staff very helpful

A Great place to stay Neat & tidy , Our stay was from 11 to 15 Sept
Warmly welcomed by the Manageress given all directions to Cabin as well as shops and ways of getting around Busselton Bunbury etc.
Will defintley come and stay again given its close proximity to the places we were going to .

The highlights for our stay were the pool and location.|We stayed for 2 nights with our daughter in a deluxe 2 bedroom chalet.|The chalet was fairly basic, small and simple. The bed was only a double and the bathroom had zero bench space, both were annoying, otherwise it was ok. It was well equipped with bunk beds, couch, kitchen with stove top and microwave (note no oven or dishwasher).|The best features were the heated indoor pool which we spent an hour enjoying, even though the outside temperature was only 17 degrees. The location was perfect and the playground was also great.|The rates probably match what you getbut the same beach front location as some resorts that charge twice the price!

Great location and facilities and beach access. Camping areas were large and grassed with matts for tents etc.  Facility was very clean and pool was nice and relaxing. friendly staff.
Highly recommend sraying there

Had a lovely stay here,  check in was simple and our site was lovely. Good flat sites with plenty of shade. Our dogs loved the grassy site.  Toilets and showers well maintained and the laundry has lots of machines and dryers.
We didn’t swim in the pool but it felt lovely and warm.  Thoroughly enjoyed our stay.  Best value for money we’ve seen in Months.  Thank you !!
Not woth for the money. Aircon not working properlyNice location , near to beach

Very peaceful so close to the beach and also fantastic indoor pool. Great BBQ facilities. Our cabin could do with an overhaul and a bigger tv. The tv was very tiny no tv in main bedroom. Overall I enjoyed being there.
